title: Milinda Panha: The Questions of King Milinda
description: The Greek king Menander debates the Buddhist monk Nagasena: is there a self? The chariot analogy.
introduction: The Greek king Menander debates the Buddhist monk Nagasena: is there a self? The chariot analogy.

translation.original_text: yathā hi aṅgasambhārā hoti saddo ratho iti | evaṃ khandhesu santesu hoti satto ti sammuti
translation.text: Just as the word 'chariot' is used when the parts are assembled together, so the convention 'being' is used when the aggregates exist.
